headline: Is Rollins (ROL) Still Attractively Priced After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Rollins stock still offers value at its current price, this article walks through what the numbers are really saying about the business. Rollins shares last closed at US$55.13, with returns of 8.5% over 1 year, 58.9% over 3 years and 73.9% over 5 years, while the stock has seen declines of 5.4% over 7 days, 5.0% over 30 days and 6.6% year to date. Recent attention on Rollins has mainly centered on its position in the commercial services industry and how investors...
